decks.name: Yuriko, the Tiger's Shadow - Ninja Tribal

results.deckName: Yuriko, the Tiger's Shadow - Ninja Tribal
warnings: Model output had 113 cards after color filter; list trimmed to 100.
results.summary: Transformed: General refinement. Power Casual, budget Moderate. Avg CMC ~3.16.
results.why: These swaps tighten [[Yuriko, the Tiger's Shadow]] around cheaper setup, cleaner card flow, and more reliable combat payoff. The additions improve topdeck control, tribal support, and repeatable draw, while the cuts remove clunky or lower-impact spells for a smoother casual game plan. The extra [[Island]] also helps stabilize the mana after the trim to 100 cards.

raw.summary: Transformed: General refinement. Power Casual, budget Moderate. Avg CMC ~3.16.
raw.plan: These swaps tighten [[Yuriko, the Tiger's Shadow]] around cheaper setup, cleaner card flow, and more reliable combat payoff. The additions improve topdeck control, tribal support, and repeatable draw, while the cuts remove clunky or lower-impact spells for a smoother casual game plan. The extra [[Island]] also helps stabilize the mana after the trim to 100 cards.
raw.why: These swaps tighten [[Yuriko, the Tiger's Shadow]] around cheaper setup, cleaner card flow, and more reliable combat payoff. The additions improve topdeck control, tribal support, and repeatable draw, while the cuts remove clunky or lower-impact spells for a smoother casual game plan. The extra [[Island]] also helps stabilize the mana after the trim to 100 cards.

added.arcane adaptation: [[Arcane Adaptation]] makes the team Ninjas so [[Yuriko, the Tiger's Shadow]] synergies apply more consistently.
added.bident of thassa: [[Bident of Thassa]] turns successful attacks into steady card draw for an evasive board.
added.brainstorm: [[Brainstorm]] is a cheap way to set up the top of the library for [[Yuriko, the Tiger's Shadow]].
added.island: [[Island]] improves basic mana consistency after the list cleanup.
added.reconnaissance mission: [[Reconnaissance Mission]] rewards multiple evasive attackers with repeatable card draw.
added.soothsaying: [[Soothsaying]] gives repeatable topdeck manipulation to improve [[Yuriko, the Tiger's Shadow]] triggers.

removed.aminatou's augury: [[Aminatou's Augury]] is very expensive and too slow for this lighter refinement pass.
removed.blinkmoth infusion: [[Blinkmoth Infusion]] is an oversized spell with little practical synergy here.
removed.cloud of faeries: [[Cloud of Faeries]] is low impact on its own compared with the added support pieces.
removed.consign // oblivion: [[Consign // Oblivion]] is flexible but inefficient for this streamlined build.
removed.consult the necrosages: [[Consult the Necrosages]] is a modest effect that does not efficiently support the main plan.
removed.enter the infinite: [[Enter the Infinite]] is far too costly for a casual [[Yuriko, the Tiger's Shadow]] deck aiming to function smoothly.
removed.fabricate: [[Fabricate]] is narrower than the added cards and less important to the deck's core game plan.

warnings: Model output had 113 cards after color filter; list trimmed to 100.
